description: Initiate new workflow instances or trigger existing workflow instances programmatically.

methods.name: initiate
methods.description: Initiates a workflow on-demand and returns the internal ID of the workflow instance used to track the workflow against the record.

params.name: options.recordType
params.description: The record type of the workflow base record

params.name: options.recordId
params.description: The internal ID of the base record

params.name: options.workflowId
params.description: The script ID or internal ID of the workflow

params.name: options.defaultValues
params.description: Sets field default values as name/value pairs

methods.name: trigger
methods.description: Triggers a workflow on a record. The actions and transitions are evaluated based on the current state for the workflow instance.

params.name: options.recordType
params.description: The record type of the workflow base record

params.name: options.recordId
params.description: The internal ID of the base record

params.name: options.workflowId
params.description: The script ID or internal ID of the workflow

params.name: options.workflowInstanceId
params.description: The internal ID of the workflow instance

params.name: options.actionId
params.description: The internal ID or script ID of the workflow action

params.name: options.stateId
params.description: The internal ID or script ID of the workflow state

params.name: options.defaultValues
params.description: Sets field default values as name/value pairs
